scripts.build:frontend: mkdir -p src-frontend/dist && cat src-frontend/js/plugins/markerManager.js src-frontend/js/plugins/priceLineManager.js src-frontend/js/plugins/boxManager.js src-frontend/js/plugins/positionToolManager.js src-frontend/js/plugins/lineToolManager.js src-frontend/bandPlugin.js src-frontend/js/core.js src-frontend/js/ui.js src-frontend/js/commands.js > src-frontend/dist/app-bundle.js && npx esbuild src-frontend/dist/app-bundle.js --minify --outfile=src-frontend/dist/app.min.js && npx esbuild src-frontend/terminal.css --minify --outfile=src-frontend/dist/terminal.css && cp src-frontend/index.dist.html src-frontend/dist/index.html && cp src-frontend/lightweight-charts.js src-frontend/dist/lightweight-charts.js && rm src-frontend/dist/app-bundle.js
